svg.title: Personal AI Infrastructure Topology
svg.desc: A specialized agent team dispatches across seven infrastructure domains (mesh, vault, substrate, edge, LAN, telemetry, workflow) plus a three-agent cyber peer layer (security, threat-detection, vuln-management). Every gated change writes one entry to a central append-only journal; the docs agent reads the journal and updates canonical sources.
svg.text: a specialized team, one dispatcher, seven infra domains + three cyber peers

g.text: 80–150 lines each · runbooks embedded · model tier color-coded below
each domain owned by exactly one specialist · idempotent read paths · machine identity
append-only · one entry per gated change · read by docs, telemetry & security
